card.name: Edict Etcher
card.text: Sacrifice Edict Etcher: Destroy target enchantment. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Relic Salvager
card.text: {1}{W}, {T}: If it's your turn, you get +2 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Sacrifice an artifact: Untap Relic Salvager. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Leaping Steelblood
card.text: When Leaping Steelblood enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.") {W}: Leaping Steelblood gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Satrap's Dominion
card.text: When Satrap's Dominion enters, create two 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens. {5}{W}, Exile Satrap's Dominion: Return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Cycle-Charting Genius
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Cycle-Charting Genius gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Rabbit-Style Infiltrator
card.text: Flash When Rabbit-Style Infiltrator enters, tap target permanent.

card.name: Eclipsing Arrow
card.text: Eclipsing Arrow has first strike and reach as long as you own five or more creature cards in exile and/or your graveyard.

card.name: Voice of the Sun
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you get +1 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever you attack alone (with your own power), tap target creature defending player controls.

card.name: Censor of Celestial Crimes
card.text: You may cast this spell from your graveyard by exiling five cards from your graveyard in addition to paying its other costs. Censor of Celestial Crimes can't block non-God creatures.

card.name: Immaculate Festival
card.text: Create three 1/1 white Monk creature tokens with lifelink.

card.name: Celestial-Court Envoy
card.text: {W}{W}, Exile Celestial-Court Envoy from your graveyard: You gain 5 life.

card.name: Plague-Cleansing Touch
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Draw a card.

card.name: Oaths Enforced
card.text: Exile target artifact, enchantment, or Demon.

card.name: Hero's Journey
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Orchestrate {1}{W} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Thunder-Hammer Fist
card.text: Enchant you At the beginning of your upkeep, you get +2 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Creatures can't block you unless defending player pays {X} for each creature that's blocking you, where X is your power.

card.name: Tiger-Claw Style
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control At the beginning of your upkeep, enchanted creature or player gets +X power until end of turn, where X is the number of permanents attached to that creature or player. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.)

card.name: Prophetic Victory Confidence
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. • Draw a card. If you're attacking alone (with your own power), you get +2 power until end of turn.

card.name: Weight of Legacy
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block and its activated abilities can't be activated. {5}{W}: Scry 2.

card.name: Unsealer of Fates
card.text: When Unsealer of Fates enters, prevent all damage that would be dealt to target creature or planeswalker this turn. Orchestrate {W} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Manifestation of Winter
card.text: When Manifestation of Winter enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. If you control three or more Plains, put three stun counters on that creature.

card.name: Anathema Seeker
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Whenever Anathema Seeker deals combat damage to an opponent, scry 1, then if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, draw a card.

card.name: Water-Dragon Master
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) As long as you've begun the Wyld Hunt, Water-Dragon Master gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked.

card.name: Nameless Nemesis
card.text: Flying Nameless Nemesis enters with two +1/+1 counters on it if it wasn't cast from your hand. Orchestrate {2}{U}{U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Stargraced Confidant
card.text: Orchestrate {U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Skycrystal Reliquarian
card.text: Flying When Skycrystal Reliquarian enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Sapphire Countermagic
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}. If you control six or more lands, instead counter it unless they pay {6}.

card.name: Altipani Rangers
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever you cast a spell from exile, put a +1/+1 counter on Altipani Rangers.

card.name: Predestined Maneuver
card.text: Counter target spell. When you next cast a spell this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Perfect Evasion
card.text: Target creature you control gains protection from target player until end of turn. (It can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, or enchanted by anything controlled by that player.)

card.name: Word of Dissolution
card.text: Put target creature or planeswalker on top of its owner's library. If you control three or more Swamps, that player puts a card from their hand on top of their library, then shuffles.

card.name: Harmonious Academic Method
card.text: Draw two cards. Orchestrate—{U}, Return a land you control to its owner's hand. (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Astral Guidance
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has hexproof. Orchestrate {U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Magistrate's Acuity
card.text: Enchant creature When Magistrate's Acuity enters, look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Enchanted creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Immaculate Influence
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. Whenever Immaculate Influence enters or enchanted creature deals combat damage to an opponent, draw a card.

card.name: Infiltrator's Powerbow
Soulsteel Chirurgeon
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't cast a spell this turn, you may return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Council of Masks
card.text: Whenever you cast an Aura spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Council of Masks. If you control three or more Mountains, it gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Head-Taker Juggernaut
card.text: This spell costs {4} less to cast if you personally dealt combat damage to an opponent this turn (with your own power). Menace

card.name: Haunted Quaestor
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink When Haunted Quaestor enters, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Stoneshatter Dancer
card.text: When Stoneshatter Dancer enters, each opponent loses 5 life and you gain 5 life.

card.name: Lapidara Monumentalist
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Sunblade Saboteur
card.text: When Sunblade Saboteur enters, if it's your turn, you get +3 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.)

card.name: Death's Pawn
card.text: Orchestrate costs you pay cost {1} less to pay. Whenever you cast a spell from exile, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Dead Man's Grasp
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control During your turn, enchanted creature or player gets +1 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Sacrifice Dead Man's Grasp: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Blood Vortex Hand
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +4/+4 and has lifelink. {2}{B}, Reveal Blood Vortex Hand from your hand and shuffle it into your library: Destroy target creature. You lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Single Point Shining Into the Void
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control During your turn, enchanted creature or player gets +2 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Enchanted creature or player has first strike while attacking alone.

card.name: Sevenfold Sojourner Stance
card.text: Enchant you During your turn, you get +3 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever you attack alone, if you control three or more Plains, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Gather Materiel
card.text: Target player discards two cards. Mill six cards.

card.name: Underworld Promises
card.text: Mill three cards. When you do, return up to one target creature or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Eminent Mistforged Arsenal
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. If Eminent Mistforged Arsenal wasn't cast from your hand, instead it gets +5/+5 and gains lifelink until end of turn. Orchestrate {3}{B}{B} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Death of Obsidian Butterflies
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature. If Death of Obsidian Butterflies wasn't cast from your hand, that player also sacrifices an enchantment that wasn't enchanting that creature. Orchestrate {4}{B} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: First-Circle Binding
card.text: Create a 5/5 black Demon creature token. Orchestrate—{1}{B}{B}, Discard a card. (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Flamewheel Hunter
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) As long as you've begun the Wyld Hunt, Flamewheel Hunter has trample and reach.

card.name: Thanoori Privateer
card.text: Haste Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.)

card.name: Sungraced Demagogue
card.text: Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Immaculate Weaponmaster
card.text: When Immaculate Weaponmaster enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Wavecleaver Corsair
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Whenever Wavecleaver Corsair deals combat damage to an opponent, if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, add {R}{R}{R} at the beginning of your next main phase.

card.name: Auspicious Persona
card.text: As long as you control six or more lands, Auspicious Persona gets +2/+2. {U}, Sacrifice Auspicious Persona: Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Lapidara Dragonlord
card.text: When Lapidara Dragonlord enters, put a stun counter on each land target opponent controls.

card.name: Ghostbane Auxiliaries
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) As long as it's your turn and you've begun the Wyld Hunt, Ghostbane Auxiliaries gets +2/+0.

card.name: Dreaming-Pearl Dancer
card.text: As long as you control three or more Plains, Dreaming-Pearl Dancer has first strike and vigilance. When Dreaming-Pearl Dancer enters, exile the top four cards of your library. You may cast up to one noncreature, nonland card from among them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Dramatic Deployment
card.text: Create three tapped 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens. When you next cast a noncreature spell this turn, untap those tokens and they gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sworn Siblings
card.text: Each creature you control that's enchanted or equipped gets +3/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Kingdom-Shattering Fist
card.text: Enchant player During enchanted player's turn, they get +3 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever enchanted player deals combat damage to an opponent, sacrifice Kingdom-Shattering Fist. When you do, destroy up to one target artifact.

card.name: Sledgehammer Fist Style
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control During your turn, enchanted creature or player gets +2/+0 and can't be blocked by tokens. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.)

card.name: Fire-Dragon Style
card.text: Flash Enchant you or a creature you control During your turn, enchanted creature or player gets +1 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) When Fire-Dragon Style enters, enchanted creature or player fights up to one target creature.

card.name: Searing-Anima Shikari
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) {T}: Searing-Anima Shikari deals 1 damage to target player. If you've begun the Wyld Hunt, instead it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Height Advantage
card.text: Enchant creature When Height Advantage enters, creatures without flying can't block this turn. Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.

card.name: Tempest Goremaul
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Equipped creature gets +3/+0. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to an opponent, if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, you may pay {U}. If you do, draw a card. Equip {2}

card.name: Fireblood Rival
card.text: Prowess Whenever you create a noncreature token, Fireblood Rival gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Sungraced Emissary
card.text: When Sungraced Emissary enters, if you control three or more Plains, create a 2/2 white God creature token. Whenever another creature you control dies, you gain 2 life.

card.name: House Pilla Vanguard
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Whenever House Pilla Vanguard attacks, if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Keepers of the Three Rivers
card.text: Reach As a creature enters under your control, you may pay {2}{G} and exile Keepers of the Three Rivers from your graveyard. If you do, that creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Witches of Figialta
card.text: Deathtouch {1}{G}, Discard a card: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Daudaka Warsteed
card.text: Flash When Daudaka Warsteed enters, create a Weapon token. When you do, you may attach it to another target creature you control. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Wood-Dragon Outrider
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Wood-Dragon Outrider has ward {2} as long as you've begun the Wyld Hunt. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Fate-Shrouded Wanderer
card.text: When Fate-Shrouded Wanderer enters, you may put a basic land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. Then if you control three or more Islands, draw a card.

card.name: Avenger of Souls
card.text: Avenger of Souls gets +2/+2 as long as you own five or more creature cards in exile and/or your graveyard.

card.name: Colossal Familiar
card.text: Whenever Colossal Familiar attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on another target attacking creature you control.

card.name: Huntsworn Emissary
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) When Huntsworn Emissary leaves the battlefield, you gain 2 life. If you've begun the Wyld Hunt, create a 2/2 white God creature token.

card.name: Memories of the First Age
card.text: Choose one — • Target permanent you control gains indestructible until end of turn. • If you control six or more lands, permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Reunite the Circle
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. Put up to two Aura, Equipment, and/or creature cards from among them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Unseen Scream's Revelations
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Then if you control three or more Swamps, you may return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Feats of Strength
card.text: Enchant creature When Feats of Strength enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has trample.

card.name: Dragonsblood Inheritance
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2. If you control three or more Mountains, instead it gets +5/+2.

card.name: Steelshatter Adept
card.text: Steelshatter Adept has first strike during your turn. If a source would deal noncombat damage to you or Steelshatter Adept, prevent 3 of that damage. Whenever Steelshatter Adept deals combat damage to an opponent, that player sacrifices an artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Rectifier of Celestial Order
card.text: Whenever Rectifier of Celestial Order enters or attacks, tap target creature. Orchestrate {1}{W} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Orichalcum Metallurge
card.text: Vigilance {W}, {T}: Exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.") Equipped creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Taker of Crowns
card.text: {W}, {T}: If it's your turn, you get +1 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever you attack alone (with your own power), you gain lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Gatekeeper of Heaven
card.text: When Gatekeeper of Heaven enters, if you own five or more creature cards in exile and/or your graveyard, exile up to one target non-God creature or planeswalker until Gatekeeper of Heaven leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Steel-Devil Duelist
card.text: Double strike The first time you create a token each turn, you may pay {W}{W}. If you do, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on Steel-Devil Duelist.

card.name: Ancestral Thaumaturge
card.text: {3}{W}{W}, Exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard: Create a tapped token that's a copy of that card except it has no mana cost and it's a Spirit in addition to its other types.

card.name: Altipani Skyknight
card.text: Flying {W}, Return Altipani Skyknight to its owner's hand: Create a Weapon token attached to another target creature. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Solar Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact. • Target creature gets +1/+1 for each token you control and gains lifelink until end of turn. • Each player puts up to three cards from their hand onto the bottom of their library in any order, then draws that many cards.

card.name: Heartstone Bracers
card.text: {5}{W}: Equipped creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each token you control. Equip {W}

card.name: Armaments Reclaimed
card.text: Search your library for an artifact or enchantment card, reveal it, shuffle, then put that card on top of your library. If it has a subtype, draw a card.

card.name: Stormdaunt Swashbuckler
card.text: Orchestrate {4}{U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.) When Stormdaunt Swashbuckler enters, draw a card for each spell you cast this turn.

card.name: Thanoori Sharpshooters
card.text: Ward {2} When Thanoori Sharpshooters enters, you may return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Soulkeeper Privateer
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) When Soulkeeper Privateer enters or leaves the battlefield, if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, choose up to four target cards in a single graveyard. Their owner shuffles them into their library.

card.name: Daiklaive Duelist
card.text: Flash This spell costs {2} less to cast for each orchestrated card you own in exile.

card.name: First-Age Reclaimer
card.text: Orchestrate {1}{U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.) When First-Age Reclaimer enters, add {C}{C}{C}. You can't spend this mana to cast spells.

card.name: Fleet Command Authority
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has base power and toughness 8/8. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, create a basic colorless Island land token.

card.name: Wave-Parting Walk
card.text: Choose one or both — • Counter target creature or enchantment spell. • You may discard a land card. If you do, create a tapped basic land token named Wastes with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Sidereal Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Untap target permanent. Return Sidereal Charm to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step. • Target creature or player can't be blocked this turn. • Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Seek Time's Threads
card.text: Search your library for a card with orchestrate, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If this spell wasn't cast from your hand, you may pay {0} instead of the next orchestrate cost you pay this turn. Orchestrate {4}{U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Elemental Legacy
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0. When Elemental Legacy is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return Elemental Legacy to its owner's hand.

card.name: Ghost-Namer
card.text: When Ghost-Namer enters, mill two cards. {3}{B}{B}, {T}, Exile Ghost-Namer: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. It gains indestructible until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Blood-Ape Bodyguard
card.text: First strike Whenever a creature blocks you (while attacking with your own power), Blood-Ape Bodyguard deals damage equal to its power to that creature.

card.name: Night-Caste Guerilla
card.text: Night-Caste Guerilla has first strike as long as you are personally attacking (with your own power). Whenever Night-Caste Guerilla deals combat damage to an opponent, return target Aura card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Void-Circle Spellreaver
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Void-Circle Spellreaver gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Shaper of Flesh
card.text: Flying, lifelink Orchestrate—{4}{B}{B}, Pay 6 life. (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Heroes Act, Villains React
card.text: Destroy target creature or land. When you next cast a spell this turn, create two 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens.

card.name: Ancestor's Due
card.text: {2}{B}, Exile three cards from your graveyard: You gain 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Abyssal Tutor
card.text: Search your library for a card and put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. If this spell wasn't cast from your hand, put that card into your hand instead of your graveyard. Orchestrate {2}{B}{B} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Abyssal Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with power 2 or less. • Return target creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to your hand. • You gain 2 life for each creature that died this turn.

card.name: Laughing Wounds Form
card.text: Enchant player During enchanted player's turn, they get +1 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever enchanted player deals combat damage to an opponent, sacrifice Laughing Wounds Form and that opponent discards two cards.

card.name: Deathknight Scythe
Pyretic Prodigy
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. If it's an artifact or enchantment card, you may cast it this turn.

card.name: Twinblade Hunter
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) As long as it's your turn and you've begun the Wyld Hunt, Twinblade Hunter has double strike.

card.name: Flamestaff Innovator
card.text: Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, create a Weapon token and attach it to Flamestaff Innovator. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Decadent Dragonborn
card.text: Creatures you control have defender and "Whenever you personally attack (with your own power), you get +1 power until end of turn."

card.name: House Munio Paragons
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) {R}: Target creature can't block this turn. Activate only if House Munio Paragons is attacking and you've begun the Wyld Hunt.

card.name: Duelist's Contemplation
card.text: Up to one target creature an opponent controls blocks an enchanted attacker this turn if able. Up to one target creature an opponent controls blocks an equipped attacker this turn if able. Untap those creatures.

card.name: Red-Jade Reaver
card.text: When Red-Jade Reaver enters, add {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast Aura and Equipment spells and pay equip costs.

card.name: Puissant Salvage Sense
card.text: Whenever you cast this spell or another noncreature spell, search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {X}{X}{R}, Exile Puissant Salvage Sense: Return X target noncreature, nonland cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Terrestrial Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Attach target Equipment to target creature. • If you or a source you control would deal damage this turn, instead that source deals that much damage plus 1. • Create two tapped 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Loyalty's Reward
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target noncreature artifact or enchantment you control. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Terrestrial Court
card.text: Whenever Terrestrial Court or another God enters under your control, reveal the top two cards of your library. Put up to one permanent card from among them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Wood-Dragon Huntcaller
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) At the beginning of your end step, if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, create a tapped 1/1 white Monk creature token with lifelink.

card.name: Charging Oxdragon
card.text: Trample, haste Protection from mana value 2 or less (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything with mana value 2 or less.)

card.name: Echo of the Elders
card.text: Whenever one or more land cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Echo of the Elders. {T}, Remove a counter from a creature you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Silver General's Foresight
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature attacks, creatures you control get +4/+4 until end of turn.

card.name: Enlightened Mentor
card.text: Vigilance, ward {3} At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control six or more lands, put a +1/+1 counter on Enlightened Mentor.

card.name: Lessons in Blood
card.text: Create X Weapon tokens, where X is the number of lands you control. When you do, you may attach them to target creature you control. (Weapons are Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Reaver's Daiklaive
Lunar Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. • Target attacking creature you control fights another target creature. • Copy target triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: As Hammer on Iron
card.text: Whenever you or a creature you control attacks alone, scry 1 and put a flurry counter on As Hammer on Iron. {2}{W}, Remove four flurry counters from As Hammer on Iron and sacrifice it: Creatures you control get +3/+3 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Celestial Legacy
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and can't be blocked by tokens. When Celestial Legacy is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return Celestial Legacy to its owner's hand.

card.name: Myriad Radiant Prophet
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever an opponent casts a spell, create a 2/2 white God creature token unless they pay {2}. Gods you control have lifelink.

card.name: Yongsyl, Daughter of Erasyl
card.text: Indestructible Whenever a creature dealt damage by Yongsyl, Daughter of Erasyl this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on her. Yongsyl can't attack or block unless you pay {X}, where X is her power.

card.name: Sunfire Interdictor
card.text: Flash Whenever Sunfire Interdictor enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard and put an arrow counter on it. {1}{W}, Remove an arrow counter from a card an opponent owns in exile: Sunfire Interdictor gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Haunted Blademaster
Break
card.text: Choose target creature. Destroy the rest, then that creature's base power and toughness become 1/1. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Ascendant Battle Visage
card.text: Flash Enchant you or a creature you control If damage would be dealt to enchanted creature or player by a blocking creature, prevent that damage. When you do, Ascendant Battle Visage deals that much damage to any target.

card.name: Perfected Daikaive
Sorcerer-Savant
card.text: Flash When Sorcerer-Savant enters, target player puts their graveyard onto the bottom of their library in a random order. Sorcerer-Savant can't be blocked unless defending player pays {3} for each creature blocking it.

card.name: Frozen-Tide Sorcerer
card.text: Ward—Skip your next untap step. Whenever Frozen-Tide Sorcerer deals combat damage to a player, untap target permanent.

card.name: The Zho Fleet Crushed
card.text: Target player returns each creature they own to their hand. If you've begun the Wyld Hunt, you may have each player shuffle their hand into their library, then draw cards equal to the greatest number of cards any player had in their hand.

card.name: Anything, Saroja's Blade
Orria, Far from Home
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell or activate an ability for {0} or without paying its cost for the first time each turn, put a loyalty counter on Orria. [+1]: Put a stun counter on target permanent. [-X]: Reveal the top twice X cards of your library. An opponent separates them into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Adamant Pattern of Truth
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell for an alternative cost, create a colorless Keystone artifact token with "{1}, {T}: You gain 1 life." ("Without paying its mana cost" is an alternative cost.) {T}, Sacrifice seven Keystones: You can cast spells without paying their mana costs. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Fallen Wolf of the West
card.text: Fallen Wolf of the West can't be blocked by creatures with power less than or equal to the number of cards in your graveyard. Whenever Fallen Wolf of the West enters or attacks, you may exile target nonland card from your graveyard. If you do, when you next resolve a spell, cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Dead Sun Duelist
card.text: Whenever Dead Sun Duelist attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it, then you may pay {X}{B}, where X is the number of counters on it. If you do, search your library for an enchantment card with mana value X, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Nameless Antihero
card.text: Orchestrate {2}{B}{B} When Nameless Antihero enters, exile the top three cards of target opponent's library. If Nameless Antihero wasn't cast from exile, put two of those cards on the bottom of their library in a random order. You may play each card exiled this way as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type may be spent to cast it.

card.name: The Lion Forsaken
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose target opponent with less life than you. You lose X life and get +X power until end of turn, where X is the difference. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever you attack alone, The Lion Forsaken gains indestructible until your next turn.

card.name: Veil of Night
card.text: You get +X power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) When you attack alone this turn, you can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Fool-Crushing Mountain Drop
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You may exile a legendary card from it. If you don't, that player discards a card and loses 1 life.

card.name: Crimson Pentacle Blades
card.text: Enchant you During your turn, you get +2 power. Whenever you attack alone, each player loses life equal to your power.

card.name: Kerthi, Itinerant Duelist
card.text: First strike, haste Whenever Kerthi, Itinerant Duelist attacks, up to one target creature an opponent controls blocks her this turn if able.

card.name: Denouncer of Anathema
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) {2}{R}: Create a red Aura enchantment token named Incitement. It has enchant creature and "Enchanted creature has haste and can't block." This ability costs {2} less to activate if you've begun the Wyld Hunt.

card.name: Mukhauta Cicatrice
card.text: Flash When Mukhauta Cicatrice enters, copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. {R}, Sacrifice another nonland permanent: Exile Cicatrice and the top card of your library. You may play those cards until your next end step.

card.name: Schismatic Sunblader
card.text: Menace Once during each of your turns, when a noncreature, nonland permanent enters under your control, you may untap target creature an opponent controls and gain control of it until end of turn. Then each creature you control gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Burning Soul Prana
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever you cast Burning Soul Prana or another Aura spell, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn. Whenever you play a card from exile, enchanted creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Death Ray
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, exile the top card of your library, then put an aim counter on Death Ray. You may play that card this turn. Remove ten aim counters from Death Ray and sacrifice it: It deals 40 damage to target player.

card.name: Ruination Poise
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control During your turn, enchanted creature or player gets +4 power. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) If enchanted creature or player would deal combat damage to a blocking creature, instead sacrifice Ruination Poise and they deal that much damage to each creature defending player controls.

card.name: Face Your Demons
card.text: Discard your hand, then draw three cards. If you spent {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} to cast this spell, you may cast any number of cards drawn this way without paying their mana costs. Exile Face Your Demons.

card.name: Silver Faction Navigator
card.text: When Silver Faction Navigator enters, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It becomes an 8/8 Shapeshifter creature. It's still a land.

card.name: Horizon-Father Bekarys
card.text: When Horizon-Father Bekarys dies or a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard him, at the beginning of the next opponent's upkeep, return him to your hand unless an opponent pays {4}. At the beginning of your end step, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: House Pilla Ascetic
card.text: Flash Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) When House Pilla Ascetic enters, spells can't be countered this turn. As long as you've begun the Wyld Hunt, your opponents can't cast spells during your turn.

card.name: Panoply Collector
card.text: Panoply Collector enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each mana spent to cast it. When Panoply Collector enters, reveal the top X cards of your library. You may put each Aura or Equipment card with mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield attached to Panoply Collector. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Shared Reminiscence
card.text: Return up to two cards from your graveyard to your hand. Put Shared Reminiscence on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Munio Danaisak
card.text: Haste Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Whenever a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, if you've begun the Wyld Hunt, Munio Danaisak deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Heaven's Light Unbound
card.text: Vigilance, reach {G}{W}, Exile X creature cards from your graveyard: Exile target creature with mana value X. Activate only if Heaven's Light Unbound dealt damage to that creature's controller this turn. X can't be 0.

card.name: Leyline Architect
card.text: Protection from unenchanted, unequipped creatures Orchestrate {1}{W}{U} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Shape the Labyrinth
card.text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life. If Shape the Labyrinth wasn't cast from your hand, exile it and untap each land you control. Orchestrate {4}{U}{B} (You may exile this card from your hand anytime you could cast a sorcery for its orchestrate cost. When you next resolve a spell, cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Earth-Dragon Style
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control {2}: Enchanted creature or player gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of enchantments you control. If you spent {B} to activate this ability, they also gain lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.)

card.name: Blazing-Bow Shikari
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Blazing-Bow Shikari attacks each turn if able. {G}: Blazing-Bow Shikari gains hexproof until end of turn. Activate this ability only if you've begun the Wyld Hunt.

card.name: Lord of the First Hunt
card.text: When Lord of the First Hunt enters, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. {2}{G}, Exile Lord of the First Hunt from your graveyard: Reveal the top five cards of your library. Put up to one creature card from among them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Corvus-Style Insurgent
card.text: Whenever you attack alone (with your own power), prevent the next 2 damage that would be dealt to you this turn. {B}, {T}, Pay 2 life: If it's your turn, you get +2 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.)

card.name: Red-Jade Headcarvers
Hungering Henchman
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. At the beginning of your next upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{G}.

card.name: Dawn-Caste Armiger
card.text: Dawn-Caste Armiger gets +1/+1 for each token you control. {1}{R}: Create a Weapon token and attach it to Dawn-Caste Armiger. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Oracular Navigator
card.text: As long as you control six or more lands, Oracular Navigator gets +4/+4. Untap it during each other player's untap step. {1}{G}, {T}: You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Heaven-Turning Calculations
card.text: Flash Whenever you cast your second spell on an opponent's turn, draw a card. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Eternal Puppet Strings
card.text: Gain control of target creature if its mana value is 2 or less. If you didn't cast Eternal Puppet Strings from your hand, instead gain control of that creature. Orchestrate {3}{U}{B}

card.name: Cutthroat Politics
card.text: Enchant opponent When Cutthroat Politics enters, enchanted player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. Exile that card. Whenever enchanted player casts a spell with the same name as the exiled card, Cutthroat Politics deals 4 damage to them.

card.name: Danaisak's Firestorm
card.text: Danaisak's Firestorm deals X damage to each creature that isn't enchanted, equipped, or an Elemental.

card.name: Arranger of Seasons
card.text: At the beginning of each upkeep, you may exile target creature card from your graveyard. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that card. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Raven Eyes Tempest
card.text: Deathtouch You have deathtouch. If a permanent dealt damage by you or a source you control this turn would die, you may exile it instead.

card.name: Admiral Zho Aarna
card.text: Double strike Whenever Admiral Zho Aarna deals combat damage to an opponent, search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Death Rides on Cruel Hooves
card.text: When Death Rides on Cruel Hooves enters, destroy up to one target creature with mana value 2 or less. {4}{B}{G}, Exile Death Rides on Cruel Hooves from your graveyard or the battlefield: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield tapped under your control.

card.name: Golden-Antler
card.text: Whenever Golden-Antler attacks, create a 1/1 white Elk creature token with lifelink. Whenever two or more other creatures you control attack, exile the top card of your library. You gain life equal to its mana value. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Saroja, Chosen of Journeys
card.text: Each other nontoken permanent you control that entered this turn is a land in addition to its other types and has "{T}: Add one mana of any color." You may activate abilities of land creatures you control as though those creatures had haste.

card.name: Tombguard Automata
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Tombguard Automata enters or attacks, you may exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Steelblood Inheritor
card.text: When Steelblood Inheritor enters, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, create a Weapon token and attach it to Steelblood Inheritor. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Shining Heartstone
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast artifact spells and activate abilities of artifacts.

card.name: Imperial Decree
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice Imperial Decree: Exile target non-Elemental creature.

card.name: Summoning the Loyal Steel
card.text: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Sleeping Sentinel's Idol
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control three or more lands that share a subtype. {2}: Sleeping Sentinel's Idol becomes a 2/2 white God creature until end of turn.

card.name: Adjutant's Armor
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, you may pay 1 life. If you do, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token that's tapped and attacking. Equip {1}

card.name: Jadeforge Anvil
card.text: {5}, {T}: Reveal the top card of your library, then draw a card. If you revealed an artifact or enchantment card this way, draw two cards instead.

card.name: Skycutter Boomerang
Ancient Observer
card.text: Flying When Ancient Observer dies, draw a card and create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Underworld Grotto
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) Underworld Grotto enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Lapidara Stronghold
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) Lapidara Stronghold enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Thanoori Factory-Citadel
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) Thanoori Factory-Citadel enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Imperial Garrison
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) Imperial Garrison enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Worldway Archive
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) Worldway Archive enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Azaran Necropolis
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) Azaran Necropolis enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Raatkerian Port
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) Raatkerian Port enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Figialtan Protectorate
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) Figialtan Protectorate enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: First-Age Temple
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) First-Age Temple enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Mothercrag Lighthouse
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) Mothercrag Lighthouse enters tapped unless you have an opponent draw a card.

card.name: Geomantic Disruption
card.text: You may choose new targets for target spell or ability. If you changed a target of an ability of an artifact, creature, or planeswalker this way, you may exile it.

card.name: Someone Else's Destiny
card.text: Counter target instant, sorcery, or Aura spell. If that spell is countered this way, you may exile it and choose a creature you control. When that creature leaves the battlefield, you may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Master of Five
card.text: Shikari (When you attack with an enchanted attacker and an equipped attacker, begin the Wyld Hunt.) Whenever you cast a spell that targets Master of Five, copy it. If you've begun the Wyld Hunt, copy it four times instead. (Its modes and targets don't change. A copy of an Aura spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Unseen Scream of Endings
card.text: Deathtouch, indestructible Whenever a player casts a spell, you and that player each create a tapped 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. (If you cast it, create both.)

card.name: Magnaensis, Titan Slayer
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. As long as you control six or more lands, Magnaensis has equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +6/+6."

card.name: Godmother's Gift
card.text: Whenever you discard a card, you may exile it from your graveyard until Godmother's Gift leaves the battlefield. Equipped creature gets +X/+X, where X is the number of card types among cards exiled with Godmother's Gift. Equip—Discard a card.

card.name: Erasyl's Tomb
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Erasyl's Tomb: At the beginning of your next upkeep, any opponent may pay {1}. If no one does, draw two cards. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Five-Dragon Armor
Mastery of Earth
card.text: Enchant Mountain Enchanted land is a 3/3 red Soldier creature and has haste. It's still a land. When enchanted land dies, create a basic land token named Wastes with "{T}: Add {C}," then return Mastery of Earth to its owner's hand.

card.name: Labyrinth Courser
Garda Flies on Gilded Wings
card.text: Exile target creature an opponent controls and put a reincarnation counter on it. It gains "Spells you cast with the same name as this card cost {4} less to cast" for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Pillars of Reality
card.text: Counter target spell if no colored mana was spent to cast it.

card.name: Vande, Dread Guardian
card.text: Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token. If it had power 4 or greater, put two +1/+1 counters on that token. [+1]: Vande deals 1 damage to any target and you gain 1 life. [-6]: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control have indestructible."

card.name: Gates of Battle
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color among artifacts you control. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Gates of Battle: Search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Orichalcum Juggernaut
card.text: When Orichalcum Juggernaut enters, choose one — • Attach target Equipment you control that entered the battlefield this turn to this creature. • You may put an Equipment card with mana value 4 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. Orchestrate {1}{W}

card.name: Mark for Endings
card.text: Attackers you control get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn.

card.name: The Wyld Hunt COD
card.text: You begin the Wyld Hunt when you control a permanent with Shikari and attack with an enchanted creature and an equipped creature. Once you do, the Hunt continues for the rest of the game.

card.name: Monk COD
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Elk COD
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Incitement COD
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has haste and can't block.

card.name: Wastes COD
card.text: {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Keystone COD
card.text: {1}, {T}: You gain 1 life.

card.name: Spirit Copy COD
card.text: (This creature has no mana cost and is a Spirit in addition to its other types.)

card.name: Invoke the Molten Kraken
card.text: Choose one. When you cast your next spell this turn, choose the other. • Destroy up to one target nonbasic land. • Invoke the Molten Kraken deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: Weapon COD
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Crimson Grimcleaver
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has trample. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to an opponent, put that many charge counters on Crimson Grimcleaver. Remove a charge counter from Crimson Grimcleaver: Add {R}. Equip {2}{R}

card.name: Metal-Dragon Style
card.text: Enchant you or a creature you control Whenever you or a creature you control attacks alone, you may discard any number of cards. Create that many Weapon tokens. Tap an untapped Weapon you control: Enchanted creature or player gets +1 power until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mirage Arranger
Warstrider Colossus
card.text: Vigilance Warstrider Colossus can't be blocked by creatures with total power 9 or less. Whenever you or a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell an opponent controls, counter that spell if that player has spent 9 or less total mana to cast spells this turn.

card.name: Knight of Ash-Wrought Sorrow
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Knight of Ash-Wrought Sorrow, sacrifice two creatures. When Knight of Ash-Wrought Sorrow enters, exile any number of cards from your graveyard. You draw that many cards and lose that much life. Whenever Knight of Ash-Wrought Sorrow attacks, put a creature card exiled with it onto the battlefield tapped and attacking.

card.name: Lightning Ballista
card.text: {3}, {T}: If it's your turn, you get +2 power until end of turn. (As long as a player has power, they may attack and one creature may block them.) Whenever you attack this turn, choose one — • Target creature blocks you this combat if able. • Creatures without flying can't block you this combat.

card.name: Wartorn Borderland
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any type that a basic land you control could produce. {T}, Sacrifice Wartorn Borderland: Add one mana of any color. Create a tapped basic land token named Wastes with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Requisitioner of Journeys
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.") {1}, Sacrifice a Weapon: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and draw a card. Activate only if you control six or more lands.

card.name: Vande, Dread Guardian Emblem COD
card.text: Creatures you control have indestructible.

card.name: Insect COD
card.text: Flying
